case_dir.description: Absolute path to the prepared case directory.

solver.description: Solver binary to run inside the cluster container.

partition.description: Slurm partition. Omit to use the cluster default.

gpus.description: Number of GPUs. Must be >= 1 on a GPU partition.

memory_gb.description: Memory in GB to request. Default 32.

wall_time.description: Wall-clock limit, HH:MM:SS. Omit for partition default.

tags.description: Optional labels for tracking/searching the run.
